# AGENTS Master

Agenti CORE-CRAFT forniti da `scf-master-codecrafter`.

- Agent-Code — executor — code, implementation, fallback
- Agent-Design — dispatcher — design
- Agent-CodeRouter — dispatcher — code, code-ui, routing
